# Code of Conduct

This project follows the
[Contributor Covenant v2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/):
participation is harassment-free for everyone, feedback is constructive, and
disagreements stay about the work. Unacceptable behavior can be reported
privately to hello@karson.org; reports are reviewed promptly and the
reporter's privacy is respected.
